prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 2.8L Cologne V6 (engine code: PRV) with a fully built 3.0L stroker kit using forged Mahle pistons (8.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a custom billet crankshaft from JE Pistons. Pair with a custom camshaft grind from Kent Cams (280° duration, 0.500" lift) for high-RPM power delivery, retaining the stock Bosch K-Jetronic fuel injection but upgraded with a custom fuel rail and Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors.

Forced Induction: Install a Garrett GT3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom T3/T4 hybrid manifold from TurboSmart, paired with a 45mm external wastegate (TurboSmart Comp-Gate 45) and a custom air-to-water intercooler (PWR Australia) mounted in the stock bumper location. Boost pressure set to 1.2 bar (17.5 psi) via an AEM X-Series boost controller, with a custom 3" turbo-back exhaust system featuring a straight-pipe design and a MagnaFlow 2.5" stainless steel muffler.

Drivetrain & Handling: Replace the stock BorgWarner T-5 transmission with a Tremec TKO-600 5-speed (close-ratio gears: 2.87, 1.89, 1.28, 1.00, 0.82) and a twin-disc clutch from Spec Stage 3+. Upgrade the 4x4 system with a Quaife ATB differential in the rear and a custom front LSD from Wavetrac. Suspension is fully rebuilt with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (adjustable damping, 200lb/in springs), polybushings from SuperPro, and a custom strut brace from Sway-A-Way. Braking is handled by AP Racing 4-piston calipers (330mm rotors) up front and 2-piston calipers (280mm rotors) in the rear, with Ferodo DS2500 pads and braided stainless steel lines.
estetica: Body Kit: Install a full custom aero kit from Kamei (original Sierra XR4i parts adapted for the 4x4), including the iconic bi-plane rear spoiler, front lip spoiler, and side skirts. Replace the stock hood with a carbon fiber replica from Seibon, featuring a functional NACA duct for intercooler airflow. Rear quarter windows are replaced with smoked Perspex panels from a Sierra RS Cosworth, and the rear hatch is fitted with a custom rear diffuser from APR Performance.

Wheels & Stance: Fit 16x8" BBS RS wheels (ET20, 5x120 PCD) with 205/45/16 Toyo R888R tires, shod with custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) from H&R to achieve a flush fitment. Lower the car 40mm from stock ride height using the Ohlins coilovers, with aggressive camber settings (-2.5° front, -1.8° rear) for track use. Fender flares are rolled and pulled for clearance, with custom inner arches lined with sound-deadening material from Dynamat.

Interior & Details: Replace the stock Recaro seats with Sparco Pro ADV seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) and a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (6-point, TIG-welded, chrome-moly steel). The dashboard is stripped and repainted in Ford Motorsport Blue (M2J-17241-A), with a custom gauge pod from Defi (boost, oil pressure, wideband AFR) mounted on the A-pillar. The steering wheel is swapped for a Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede) with a quick-release hub, and the shift knob is a weighted aluminum unit from B&M. Exterior badging is replaced with custom carbon fiber Ford Motorsport logos (front grille, rear hatch), and the headlights are upgraded to Hella DE projectors with custom LED halos.
